no: Diablo 2 Amazon kit for Ranger class. Female only; Human, Elf, Half-elf. Three skill trees: javelin/spear, passive/magic, bow/crossbow. Includes Valkyrie companion. Skill points system: one per level up to 3M XP. Part of Shohy's Diablo2 Kit Pack Series. Author confirms EET compatibility. Languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese.

activated.effects: Jab, Power Strike, Magic/Fire/Freezing Arrow, Multiple Shot, Guided Arrow, Decoy, Valkyrie, Inner Sight, Slow Missiles.

restrictions.items: No Ranger spells or stealth. No dual-class.

new: Diablo 2-inspired ranged warrior. Javelin and bow skills with elemental abilities.

sum: Diablo 2-inspired Amazon kit for the Ranger class. Female only (Human, Elf, Half-elf). Three skill trees: javelin/spear, passive/magic, bow/crossbow. Includes Valkyrie companion.

co.n: Turns off the white wiffle ball animation of Avoid and Evade
co.tp2n: Turns off the white wiffle ball animation of Avoid and Evade
